subject: Top-down silhouette of the CannonKeys Nyawice — split-spacebar Alice layout with two coral triangular cat-ear accents friction-fit on the top-rear of the case, a small coral nose between them, and warm-bronze hairlines on the top + bottom case edges.
brief_summary: Alice-layout group-buy companion piece for the CannonKeys Nyawice: the editorial hook is the decorative cat-ears + Alice silhouette read together, not the (invisible from above) leaf-spring F1 mount.
